label: Suture removal or wound check without infection concern
inclusion_criteria: Adult with clinician-documented wound check, suture removal, or staple removal plan.
Clinician documents wound healing as expected or explicitly cleared the wound at this visit.
Clinician-entered wound follow-up plan is present.
No infection, dehiscence, retained foreign body, tendon/nerve/vascular risk, high-risk wound location, bite wound, open fracture, or specialist-directed wound plan.
exclusion_criteria: Wound infection concern, pus, spreading redness, fever, red streaks, or systemic illness.

Wound dehiscence, wound not ready for removal, early suture/staple loss, retained foreign body, tendon/nerve/vascular concern, open fracture, joint violation, bite wound, dirty wound, high-risk wound location, or poor follow-up.
Pediatric pathway, immunocompromised host, diabetic foot wound, anticoagulation-related bleeding concern, or specialist-directed wound plan.
must_not_miss: Tendon, nerve, vascular, or joint injury.
High-risk face, hand, joint, genital, scalp, or high-tension wound.
default_follow_up: Follow up on the wound schedule your clinician gave you. If no schedule was given and symptoms worsen or you are worried, arrange a recheck within 2 to 3 days.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports suture/staple wound care, infection warning signs, and following clinician instructions for wound care and removal timing. It does not support autonomous ED decisions about whether a wound is ready for removal, so runtime requires clinician-documented readiness and no infection/dehiscence concern.

terms: clinician documented wound healing as expected
clinician cleared wound at this visit
clinician entered wound follow up plan
no dehiscence infection foreign body tendon nerve vascular concern
no infection dehiscence foreign body tendon nerve vascular high risk location concern

output_modifiers.label: Diabetes wound-healing modifier
output_modifiers.note: Flag higher infection/dehiscence risk and confirm clinician-entered follow-up.

output_modifiers.label: Peripheral vascular disease wound-healing modifier
output_modifiers.note: Flag slower healing risk and confirm clinician-entered follow-up.

output_modifiers.label: Anticoagulation bleeding modifier
output_modifiers.note: Flag bleeding risk while preserving the no-infection wound-check pathway.

review.notes: Phase 222 clinician feedback applied. Approved for narrow ontology mode after antibiotics scope conflict was removed and runtime gate was tightened to expected healing or explicit wound clearance plus clinician-entered follow-up plan.
